existing_violations.exception_reason: Shared event-research dataclass bundle. Multiple tiny value objects may remain together in models.py during v1.
Intentionally outside Event Alpha. Split only in a dedicated behavior-freeze pass because TRIGGERED_FADE ownership must remain confined to event_fade.py plus proxy_fade.
